name: Crock Pot Chicken
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces chicken broth or 1 chicken bouillon cube dissolved in 2 cups water
recipeInstructions:
1. Make sure the chicken will fit inside your crock pot.
2. With a few leaves of fresh herbs (optional), prepare the slow cooker.
3. Pour half of the chicken broth into the slow cooker.
4. Arrange half of the carrots, celery, and onions at the bottom of the slow cooker.
5. Place the chicken pieces in the slow cooker, with the back side down.
6. Add the remaining broth, vegetables, salt, pepper, basil, and Italian seasonings (if using).
7. Cover the crock pot and cook on LOW heat for 7-10 hours or HIGH heat for 2 1/2 to 3 1/2 hours.
8. Serve hot over rice; enjoy!
